message:
feat(multi-engine-harness): add drift repro pack with delta-debugging source minimization

Refactor fixture evaluation into evaluate_fixture() with FixtureEvaluation
struct. Add DriftReproPack generation for divergent fixtures containing
minimized source, provenance hash, minimization stats, replay command,
and promotion hooks for downstream test fixture ingestion.

Implement delta-debugging-style source minimizer bounded to 32 rounds
and 256 candidates that shrinks drift-reproducing inputs while preserving
the original DriftSignature. Each repro pack includes a self-contained
reproduction artifact for automated triage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
